steps.title: Focus on the shared trait
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize similarity. The notes show that both the Atascosa-Cibuta Mountains and the Big Hatchet Mountains are sky islands, meaning isolated ranges with environments unlike the surrounding lowlands.

steps.title: Reject details about differences
steps.content: A discusses mountain ranges generally instead of the two named ranges. C emphasizes that the ranges cover very different areas. D mentions the shared sky-island label but makes the main point their different countries. The answer is B.
